title: Continuity mining has no active owned queue item after M-001 completion

sources.observation: The only item owned by continuity_mining is M-001 and its status is completed.
Continuity mining remains active with a priority to recover project history and update the knowledge substrate.
CM-0009 already records that M-001 completion superseded the earlier active-state interpretation.

observed: The team is active, but ACTIVE_QUEUE.json contains no active or queued item owned by continuity_mining.
inferred: Recurring continuity runs currently lack canonical ownership authority for selecting new implementation work.
proposed: A coordinating owner should add an additive M-002 queue item for decision-history and contradiction-link expansion, preserving M-001 as completed history.
superseded: The earlier interpretation that M-001 is an available highest-priority task is superseded by its completed status.
unresolved: Whether an automation run may self-authorize a new canonical queue item is not defined by the current coordination rule.
falsification_or_review_route: Re-read the cited ACTIVE_QUEUE.json blob. Falsify this record if it contains any active or queued continuity_mining-owned item besides completed M-001. Resolve the gap only with a later canonical queue blob that adds an owned item under the shared coordination rule.
implementation_boundary: This record does not modify ACTIVE_QUEUE.json and does not claim authority to create M-002.
